description: A citizen with a disability needs to apply for a handicap parking placard.

nodes.task_description: Provide the citizen with the application form, which requires a doctor's signature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a link to the correct form and explains the requirements.

nodes.task_description: Receive the completed and signed application from the citizen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the application and verifies it has been signed by a physician.

nodes.task_description: Process the application and issue the handicap parking placard.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the application and mails the placard to the citizen.
